channel.title: Global PTU on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Global PTU on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Global PTU Reservations Are Now Region-Agnostic
item.description:
Global Provisioned Throughput (PTU) reservations are now region-agnostic, so one reservation can cover Global PTU deployments across multiple regions. This change is intended to improve reservation utilization and savings.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Region-agnostic reservations for Global PTU in Microsoft Foundry
item.description:
Microsoft Foundry now offers generally available region-agnostic reservations for Global Provisioned Throughput Units (PTUs). Customers can reserve PTU capacity once and use it from any supported region instead of being tied to a single region.

  • Source: Azure Updates
